items.title: Podcast Episode Completed - Create The Best Me
items.summary: FYI from Interview Valet forwarding thank-you note from Carmen Hecox for Dr. Haas's appearance on 'Create The Best Me' podcast. Episode covered labs, burnout, perimenopause, and body composition strategies.
items.actionNeeded: Review podcast thank-you note and confirm no follow-up needed with Interview Valet.

items.title: Meeting Invite Needed - Lighthouse Lab Services
items.summary: Dr. Haas confirmed 3pm Wednesday May 20th meeting with Lighthouse Lab Services (Kara Long, Sarah Harris, Mark Roth) and asked team to send calendar invite if they don't.
items.actionNeeded: Ensure calendar invite for May 20th at 3pm has been sent to Lighthouse Lab Services attendees.
